title.en: James and Rice miss training in preparation for Panama
title.zh-CN: 詹姆斯和赖斯错过为巴拿马做准备的训练

summary.en: England's Reece James and Declan Rice miss England's penultimate training session before Panama with injury concerns.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队的里斯·詹姆斯（ Reece James ）和德克兰·赖斯（ Declan Rice ）因伤病问题在巴拿马之前错过了英格

title.en: What each team need to reach World Cup knockouts
title.zh-CN: 每支球队进入世界杯淘汰赛所需的条件

summary.en: With the final round of group fixtures under way the path to the World Cup final on 19 July is starting to take shape.
summary.zh-CN: 随着最后一轮小组赛的举行，通往7月19日世界杯决赛的道路开始成形。

title.en: Why it's time for Saka and Rashford - Shearer

summary.en: Former England captain Alan Shearer explains why Thomas Tuchel needs to change some personnel as well as his team's mindset when they face Panama.
summary.zh-CN: 前英格兰队队长艾伦·希勒（ Alan Shearer ）解释了为什么托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）需要更换一些人员，以及他的团队面对巴拿马时的心态。

title.en: Is the World Cup ball making it hard for goalkeepers?
title.zh-CN: 世界杯球对守门员来说难吗？

summary.en: While some goalkeepers have produced heroic performances in the World Cup, others have struggled with shots from outside the area, so is there a problem with the ball?
summary.zh-CN: 虽然一些守门员在世界杯上取得了英雄般的表现，但其他守门员却在区域外的投篮中挣扎，所以球有问题吗？

title.en: What Scotland need to reach World Cup knockouts
title.zh-CN: 苏格兰需要什么才能达到世界杯淘汰赛

summary.en: After their 3-0 defeat by Brazil, BBC Sport looks at what Scotland require to reach the knockout phase.
summary.zh-CN: 在3-0击败巴西之后，英国广播公司体育台着眼于苏格兰达到淘汰赛阶段所需的条件。

title.en: Sane gives Germany lead as Ecuador calls for foul waived away
title.zh-CN: SANE让德国领先，因为厄瓜多尔要求放弃犯规

summary.en: Leroy Sane gives Germany a 1-0 lead against Ecuador in the second minute of the World Cup Group E match at the New York New Jersey Stadium.
summary.zh-CN: 在纽约新泽西体育场举行的世界杯E组比赛的第二分钟， Leroy Sane让德国队以1-0领先厄瓜多尔。

title.en: Scotland on the brink after defeat by Brazil
title.zh-CN: 苏格兰在巴西战败后濒临灭绝

summary.en: Scotland's hopes of reaching the knockout stages of the World Cup for the first time are in significant peril with calamitous defending allowed Brazil to win 3-0 in Miami and finish top of Group C.
summary.zh-CN: 苏格兰希望首次进入世界杯的淘汰赛阶段，但由于灾难性的防守，巴西队在迈阿密以3比0获胜，并获得了C组的冠军。

title.en: Morocco progress after victory over Haiti
title.zh-CN: 摩洛哥战胜海地后取得进展

summary.en: Soufiane Rahimi and Gessime Yassine score late goals for Morocco to deny Haiti their first-ever World Cup point in Atlanta.
summary.zh-CN: 苏菲安娜·拉希米（ Soufiane Rahimi ）和盖西梅·亚辛（ Gessime Yassine ）为摩洛哥进球较晚，否认海地在亚特兰大首次获得世界杯积分。

title.en: South Africa into round of 32 after win over South Korea
title.zh-CN: 南非在战胜韩国后进入32强

summary.en: Thapelo Maseko's second-half goal gives South Africa a 1-0 win over South Korea in Monterrey, and sends them into the World Cup knockout phase.
summary.zh-CN: 塔佩洛·马塞科（ Thapelo Maseko ）的下半场进球让南非在蒙特雷以1比0战胜韩国，并将他们送入世界杯淘汰赛阶段。

title.en: World Cup makes more than enough money - New York mayor Mamdani
title.zh-CN: 世界杯赚的钱绰绰有余--纽约市长马姆达尼

summary.en: Mayor of New York Zohran Mamdani says the World Cup generates "more than enough" income and supporters should not have to pay higher prices.
summary.zh-CN: 纽约市长Zohran Mamdani表示，世界杯产生了“足够多”的收入，支持者不应该支付更高的价格。

title.en: Tottenham sign former Arsenal midfielder Pelova
title.zh-CN: 托特纳姆签下前阿森纳中场佩洛娃

summary.en: Tottenham confirm the signing of Netherlands midfielder Victoria Pelova following her exit from Arsenal.
summary.zh-CN: 托特纳姆确认荷兰中场维多利亚·佩洛娃在退出阿森纳后签约。

title.en: How brands banned from the World Cup became the story
title.zh-CN: 被禁止参加世界杯的品牌如何成为故事

summary.en: When we try to suppress something, we often make it more visible - and Fifa is living that in real time with its sponsors.
summary.zh-CN: 当我们试图压制某些东西时，我们通常会让它变得更加明显-而国际足联正在与其赞助商实时生活在一起。

title.en: Pochettino has US believing they can be World Cup winners
title.zh-CN: 波切蒂诺让美国相信他们可以成为世界杯冠军

summary.en: Mauricio Pochettino has united the USA fans and players in a belief that they are capable of winning the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: Mauricio Pochettino将美国球迷和球员团结在一起，相信他们有能力赢得世界杯。

title.en: Mexico beat Czech Republic to maintain 100% winning record
title.zh-CN: 墨西哥击败捷克共和国，保持100%的胜利纪录

summary.en: Mexico score three second-half goals to eliminate the Czech Republic from the World Cup and end the group phase with maximum points.
summary.zh-CN: 墨西哥队打进三个下半场进球，将捷克共和国淘汰出世界杯，并以最高分结束小组赛阶段。

title.en: 'Typical Scotland': Tartan Army give their verdict on Miami match against Brazil
title.zh-CN: “典型的苏格兰” ： Tartan军队对迈阿密对巴西的比赛做出判决

summary.en: Scotland's hopes of reaching the knockout stages of the World Cup are in peril after Brazil won 3-0 in Miami.
summary.zh-CN: 在巴西以3比0战胜迈阿密之后，苏格兰进入世界杯淘汰赛阶段的希望岌岌可危。

title.en: Vinicius Jr stops fun and leaves Scots down... but are they out?

summary.en: Scotland's party stops at the hands of Brazil in Miami, but might they still find themselves in the last 32?

title.en: BBC and Sidemen to host World Cup watchalong

summary.en: BBC Sport and YouTube collective the Sidemen team up for a World Cup watchalong on Thursday.
